name: Berlin
description: Capital city with vibrant street art, museums, nightlife, and historic sites.

name: Gothenburg
description: Sweden's coastal city with archipelago islands, food culture, and beautiful waterfront.

name: Krakow

name: Prague
description: Fairy-tale city with Charles Bridge, Prague Castle, and bohemian charm.
